architecture.summary: A standard neural network (details unspecified in abstract) trained via meta-learning for compositionality (MLC), a training procedure that presents a dynamic stream of compositional tasks to optimize the model's compositional skills. The model processes instructions and learns to generalize systematically to novel compositional combinations, similar to human behavior in an instruction-learning paradigm.

biblio.title: Human-like systematic generalization through a meta-learning neural network

claims.statement: Neural networks can achieve human-like systematicity when optimized for their compositional skills

baseline.name: probabilistic symbolic models and standard neural networks

claims.statement: MLC achieves both the systematicity and flexibility needed for human-like generalization, in contrast to probabilistic symbolic models (perfectly systematic but rigid) and standard neural networks (perfectly flexible but unsystematic)
MLC advances the compositional skills of machine learning systems in several systematic generalization benchmarks
Human behavioural experiments using an instruction learning paradigm show MLC achieves human-like generalization in head-to-head comparison with seven different models
